title: Legal Counseling * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Legal Counseling * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Ex-Offenders Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and limited legal services to people with disabilities. DRO's individual advocacy focuses on providing callers with information and materials about their rights to help them advocate for themselves. Occasionally, Disability Rights Oregon will engage in litigation to protect the rights of Oregonians under applicable federal and state laws. DRO does not provide the following services: -Representation in criminal or family law matters -Help finding employment, housing, or financial assistance -Case management -Assistance for short term disability issues -Transportation to doctor's office -Applying for or appealing denial of Social Security disability benefits -Estates and trusts -Becoming the guardian of a person with a disability -Out-of-state issues -Workers' compensation -Medical malpractice or personal injury -Consumer or bankruptcy issues -Anything that is not the wish of the person with the disability 900 SW 5th Avenue Suite 1800 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Individuals with disabilities who have legal issues related to their disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 243-2081 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON
